claims.summary: Fallback texture vocabulary should preserve Astrid's structural-integrity terms scaffolded-persistence and anchor-weight.
High-entropy texture weighting should remain graded and preserve density, pressure, and shadow distinctions without a static sampler rewrite.
Compare mode-packing and entropy conditions offline to determine whether heavy texture becomes less distinguishable before changing fallback routing.
Changing the compatibility threshold or forcing a provider profile at high entropy changes live generation behavior and requires operator approval plus canary and rollback evidence.
